feature_tested: Manager P&L Dashboard - Role-Based Access Control
summary: All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all Manager Dashboard features: role-scoped P&L views, budget alerts, GL drill-down with invoice/PO chain, AI executive review, and access request workflow. The user selector dropdown correctly switches between different role views (Manager sees 5 lines/9 locked, GM sees 14 lines/0 locked, Supervisor sees 3 lines/11 locked, Exec Chef sees 6 lines/8 locked).

endpoints: GET /api/manager/pnl?user_id=usr-mgr-001 - Manager sees 5 visible lines (revenue, food_cost, bev_cost, hourly_labor, opex) and 9 locked sections
GET /api/manager/pnl?user_id=usr-gm-001 - GM sees 14 visible lines and 0 locked sections (full access)
GET /api/manager/pnl?user_id=usr-sup-001 - Supervisor sees 3 visible lines (revenue, food_cost, hourly_labor) and 11 locked
GET /api/manager/pnl?user_id=usr-chef-001 - Exec Chef sees 6 visible lines and 8 locked
GET /api/manager/pnl?user_id=usr-ctrl-001 - Controller sees 14 visible lines and 0 locked (full access)
GET /api/manager/alerts?user_id=usr-mgr-001 - Returns alerts with critical/warning severity for labor overspending (33.1% vs 25% target)
GET /api/manager/gl-drilldown/5000 - Returns GL entries + linked invoices with PO and receiving chain (30 invoices with FULL CHAIN status)
GET /api/manager/gl-drilldown/6000 - Returns BOH Labor GL entries
POST /api/manager/access-request - Creates request and notification for controller
POST /api/manager/ai-review?user_id=usr-mgr-001 - Returns AI narrative scoped to manager role
POST /api/manager/ai-review?user_id=usr-gm-001 - Returns AI narrative for GM with full scope

verified_elements: 'My Operations' visible in sidebar under FINANCIAL & SUPPLY section
Manager Dashboard panel loads with data-testid='manager-dashboard-panel'
Manager view shows 5 P&L lines and 9 locked sections
GM view shows 14 P&L lines and 0 locked sections
KPIs displayed: Revenue $137,718, Avg Check $87, Food Cost 20.9%, Hourly Labor 33.1%
Budget Performance gauges visible (Food Cost %, Beverage Cost %, Hourly Labor %, Waste %)
4 tabs visible: My P&L, Alerts (10), GL Drill-Down, AI Review
Alerts tab shows critical/warning alerts with severity badges and cost impact
GL Drill-Down tab shows GL code buttons and linked invoices with FULL CHAIN status
AI Review tab shows EchoAi³ Executive Review personalized for user
Locked sections show 'Request Access' buttons with required role info
Request Access toast notification appears after clicking button

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation correctly scopes P&L visibility based on user role (ROLE_PNL_ACCESS mapping)
Budget alerts correctly flag overspending with critical/warning thresholds (labor at 33.1% triggers critical alert)
GL drill-down correctly links invoices to POs and receiving logs (chain_complete flag)
AI review uses Emergent LLM Key with gpt-4.1-mini model for personalized narratives
Access request creates notification for controller role
test_credentials: No auth required - dev mode. Test users: usr-mgr-001 (manager), usr-chef-001 (exec_chef), usr-gm-001 (gm), usr-ctrl-001 (controller), usr-sup-001 (supervisor)
seed_data_creation: RBAC users seeded on startup via seed_rbac(). Simulation data exists (2713 POS transactions, 63 invoices, 156 GL entries, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager Dashboard (My Operations) panel fully functional. Role-based P&L scoping works correctly - managers see department-level data with locked salary sections, GMs/Controllers see full resort P&L. Budget alerts flag labor overspending (33.1% vs 25% target). GL drill-down shows invoice/PO/receiving chain. AI review generates personalized narratives via Emergent LLM Key. Toast POS and QuickBooks remain MOCKED.
